features: Fase 4B: Asynchronous persistence with coalescent queue (state, network, GPIO)
Fase 4B.1: Profile service persistence decoupled from request path
Fase 4C: Task Watchdog Timers (TWDT) with recovery and metrics
Unified speed/level slider calibration across effects
Snapshot pattern for lock-free reads in render loop
AudioService I2S stabilized in MASTER_RX mode with runtime telemetry
Audio-reactive pipeline unified across all effects

added: Last boot timestamp in home API response
Triple Chase, Gradient Meteor, Scanning Pulse, Trig Ribbon
Lava Flow, Polar Ice, Stellar Twinkle, Random Color Pop, Bouncing Physics
improved: Effect slider semantics: speed and level now consistent and more predictable
Audio diagnostics with periodic serial telemetry (level, peak, read bytes and read error)
fixed: Potential CoreState corruption during concurrent API + render access
Render frame drops due to storage I/O blocking
Blink speed inversion (high speed now means faster animation)

knownLimitations: LittleFS writes still synchronous (moved to control task, not blocking API)
Single WiFi network configuration (no fallback networks)
nextPhase: Fase 5.1: FFT bands (bass/mid/treble) and per-effect audio mappings
